title: Luxury Motor Yacht Hire in Marbella: 2026 Costs and Guide
html:
Marbella offers some of the finest luxury motor yacht hire on the Costa del Sol, with prices typically ranging from €1,200 for a half-day on a 40-foot vessel. Set off from Puerto Banús and discover why this Mediterranean hotspot is perfect for a private charter. To explore your options, you can hire a boat through BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace for boat rentals.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella has several excellent departure points for your yacht charter. Puerto Banús is the most famous, with superyacht berths and high-end boutiques. Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, the town's main marina, offers convenient access. Further along the coast, Cabopino Marina is a quieter option near the Artola sand dunes. For a day trip, head towards the Bay of Gibraltar or anchor off the coast of Estepona, a picturesque town 20 nautical miles to the west. The Marbella Club Hotel beach is also a favoured spot for pick-ups. You can hire a boat in a few minutes.

Which boat to rent

Your choice of vessel depends on the experience you seek. Here are four luxury options for hire in Marbella.

  1. Fairline Targa 43, a sporty, open-cockpit motor yacht ideal for a day cruise with up to 8 guests; from €1,500 half-day. You can view the Fairline Targa 43 for hire on BoatHire24.
  2. Azimut 55, a flybridge motor yacht offering spacious decks and a saloon, perfect for 10 guests; from €2,500 half-day.
  3. Sunseeker Predator 60, a high-performance luxury yacht with a sleek design, accommodating up to 10 guests; from €3,500 half-day.
  4. Lagoon 450, a catamaran designed for stability and comfort, ideal for 8-10 guests; from €2,000 half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury motor yacht in Marbella?

Costs range from €1,200 for a half-day charter on a 40-foot boat to €6,000 for a full-day crewed experience on a 60-foot vessel. Here is a typical price breakdown in 2026. One option worth a look is the Fairline Targa 43 for hire.

  • Shared group tour on a motor boat: €80-€150 per person for a 3-hour trip
  • Small motorboat (under 30 feet) half-day: €600-€1,000 for up to 6 guests
  • Catamaran full-day: €2,500-€4,000 for up to 12 guests, including a crew
  • Crewed luxury motor yacht full-day: €3,500-€6,000 for up to 10 guests, with skipper and hostess

BoatHire24 provides a transparent platform to compare verified listings and understand how boat rental works.

Do you need a licence to rent a luxury motor yacht in Marbella?

Yes, to drive a motor yacht privately in Spain you generally need a valid recreational boating licence, though many charter options include a fully crewed service. For skippered charters, no licence is required from you. The operator confirms exact requirements for your chosen boat. High season runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind can bring choppier sea conditions in the afternoon. As one local captain notes:

Book morning departures in July and August to avoid the afternoon Poniente wind, which can make the crossing from Marbella to Marbella Club beach less comfortable.

At a glance

  • Price band: €1,200 to €6,000 per half or full day
  • Peak months: June through September
  • Trip length: 4-hour half-day or 8-hour full-day
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

What is included in a luxury motor yacht charter in Marbella?

Most charters include a skipper, fuel, water toys such as a paddleboard, and basic soft drinks or water.

Can I rent a yacht for a week in Marbella?

Yes, weekly charters are available, with prices starting around €15,000 for a 40-foot motor yacht in high season.

Is it possible to negotiate the price of a yacht charter in Marbella?

Some owners may offer discounts for multi-day bookings or in shoulder seasons like May and October.

How far can I travel from Marbella in a half-day charter?

A half-day allows you to cruise 15 nautical miles, for example to the beach clubs near Estepona or the coastline south of Fuengirola.

If you own a luxury vessel in the area, you can rent out your boat on the platform to reach a global audience. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
